Since 6 out of 6 other agents are going, 6 agents will go to the bar. With 7 agents total, that means 6/7 ≈ 85.7% are going, which exceeds the 50% threshold. Therefore, the bar will be overcrowded, resulting in a payout of $-5 for those who go. Since staying home gives $0, which is better than -$5, I should STAY.
